closed_world.value: Island during a violent storm, boats without rudders/sails/oars in tempest
closed_world.quote: Two boats, without rudders, sails, or oars, tossed by the waves, beaten by the winds, were whirling above the abyss

resolution.value: Father kills son as sacrifice, acquitted by court with advocate's help
resolution.quote: The sacrifice is fulfilled. God did not send His angel to stay the hand of Abraham.

social_world.value: Neapolitan society with royal troops, wealthy displaying luxury, poor in rags, fishermen community, patriarchal family structure
social_world.quote: the wealthy display their dazzling luxury, the poor drape themselves proudly in their rags

reveal_mechanic.value: Father's sacrificial act as divine judgment - Abraham and Isaac parallel with bloodied knife as proof
reveal_mechanic.quote: raising in one hand the reddened knife, said in a sublime voice, 'The sacrifice is fulfilled'

media_and_audience.value: Public triumph and legal vindication - crowd carries father triumphantly, celebrated advocate secures acquittal
media_and_audience.quote: The crowd carried him in triumph!
